{
  "lean_declaration": "theorem fps_subs_X_right (g : K⟦X⟧) : PowerSeries.subst (X : K⟦X⟧) g = g := by\n  have hX0 : constantCoeff (X : K⟦X⟧) = 0 := by simp\n  ext n\n  rw [fps_comp_coeff g (X : K⟦X⟧) hX0 n]\n  rw [finsum_eq_single (fun d => coeff d g * coeff n (X ^ d)) n]\n  · simp\n  · intro d hd\n    simp [hd, coeff_X_pow]",
  "declaration_name": "fps_subs_X_right",
  "used_context": [
    "PowerSeries.subst",
    "constantCoeff",
    "fps_comp_coeff",
    "finsum_eq_single",
    "coeff_X_pow"
  ],
  "notes": [
    "Fixed proof by replacing apply with rw for finsum_eq_single, following local pattern from fps_subs_wd_constCoeff."
  ]
}
